mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase discount rates for equities, compressing valuations and driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points over two months signals labor market deterioration, reducing corporate earnings expectations and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances, or unemployment spikes fail to predict earnings revisions.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized contraction in consumer and capital demand, forcing equity price adjustments downward over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint declines in RSAFS and HOUST are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in >60% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of high inflation, a sharp drop in industrial production signals supply chain bottlenecks and stagflation risks, triggering immediate risk-off flows and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during high inflation are followed by positive 5-day returns in >50% of instances, or the signal reverses direction when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation exceeds 3.5% while the federal funds rate remains below 4.5%, markets price in aggressive future tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in >60% of periods meeting the trigger, or the inflation-rate spread loses predictive power in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate income and consumer spending capacity, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive payroll growth is followed by negative 60-day returns in >55% of cases, or Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery phase, a divergence where real GDP growth outpaces retail sales indicates business investment leading consumer spending, creating a positive earnings revision cycle and short-term equity upside.
failure_condition: The GDP-retail sales divergence fails to predict positive 5-day returns in >50% of recovery periods, or the signal reverses during recessionary phases.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and housing starts below their 12-month moving averages signals a broad-based economic slowdown, prompting defensive portfolio rebalancing and negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and HOUST both below 12-month MA
failure_condition: Joint contractions are followed by positive 20-day returns in >60% of instances, or the moving average crossover loses predictive significance in walk-forward validation.
